LightningComponentBundle.description: A primary button with a save icon that follows SLDS 2 compliance requirements. This reusable component provides a consistent save action with proper accessibility, theming, and user feedback.

property.name: label
property.label: Button Label
property.description: The text label displayed on the button

property.name: title
property.label: Button Title
property.description: The tooltip text shown when hovering over the button

property.name: isDisabled
property.label: Is Disabled
property.description: Whether the button should be disabled

property.name: helpText
property.label: Help Text
property.description: Optional help text to display below the button

property.name: showHelpText
property.label: Show Help Text
property.description: Whether to display the help text below the button

property.name: label
property.label: Button Label
property.description: The text label displayed on the button

property.name: isDisabled
property.label: Is Disabled
property.description: Whether the button should be disabled
